title: Borscht Soup
description: A classic Ukrainian beet-based soup with a rich and flavorful broth.
instructions: 1. In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the chopped carrots and beets, and cook for another 5 minutes.
4. Add the shredded cabbage and cook for 2-3 minutes until slightly wilted.
5. Pour in the vegetable stock and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
7. Stir in the store-bought or homemade borscht and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot, topped with a dollop of peppery sour cream.
10. Garnish with chopped fresh dill or chives if desired.
